Sky-High Afternoon Tea at Duck & Waffle 🍰

🗺️🔗 Link to the London map with the best spots to visit and the latest promo codes🎁-saved in bio

Served in a hand-painted duck egg inspired by the restaurant’s signature dish☕️ Enjoy curated selection of sweet and savoury bites by Executive Chef Jonathan Bowers (Highlights include Cubano Sandwiches, Jaffa Macarons, Sticky Toffee Waffles, and more🧇)

🕥Monday–Friday, 2:30–4:30pm, priced at £55pp (vegetarian menu available)

📍 Duck & Waffle 🏙️40 floors above the city @duckandwaffle
